// To store detailed metadata for grid questions\\n\\n  items.forEach(item => {\\n    const questionId = item.questionItem?.question?.questionId;\\n    const questionTitle = item.title;\\n\\n    // Map general question IDs to titles\\n    if (questionId && questionTitle) {\\n      questionIdToTitle[questionId] = questionTitle;\\n    } else if (questionId && !questionTitle) {\\n      // Question ID found, but no title available, map it to itself to prevent loss\\n      questionIdToTitle[questionId] = questionId;\\n    }\\n\\n    // Handle Grid Questions that are part of a 'questionGroupItem'\\n    if (item.questionGroupItem && item.questionGroupItem.grid) {\\n      const gridTitle = item.title; 'multiple choice grid' : 'checkbox grid';\\n\\n      const rows = item.questionItem.question.rowQuestion.options.map(option => {\\n        if (option.value && option.text) {\\n          const });\\n\\n      const columns = item.questionItem.question.grid?.columns?.options.map(option => {\\n        if (option.value && option.text) {\\n          questionIdToTitle[option.value] = option.text;\\n        }\\n        return { value: option.value, text: option.text };\\n      }) || [];\\n\\n      gridQuestionsMetadata[gridId] = {\\n        title: gridTitle,\\n        rows: rows,\\n        columns: columns,\\n        type: gridType\\n      };\\n    }\\n  });\\n\\n  return { questionIdToTitle, createTime, lastSubmittedTime, gridQuestionsMetadata };\\n}\\n\\n// Function to fetch form responses and replace question IDs with titles in a flattened structure\\nasync function getFormResponses(questionIdToTitle, gridQuestionsMetadata) {\\n  const formResponsesUrl = `https://forms.googleapis.com/v1/forms/${context?.inputData?.id}/responses`;\\n  const response = await axios.get(formResponsesUrl);\\n  const responses = response.data.responses || [];\\n\\n  // Get the current time and calculate the time `scheduledTime` minutes ago\\n  const currentTime = new Date();\\n  const scheduledTimeMinutes = parseInt(context.inputData?.scheduledTime, 10);\\n  const filterTimeAgo = new Date(currentTime.getTime() - (isNaN(scheduledTimeMinutes) ? 15 : scheduledTimeMinutes) * 60 * 1000);\\n\\n  // Format responses to replace question IDs with titles and filter by last `scheduledTime` minutes\\n  const formattedResponses = responses\\n    .map(response => {\\n      // Flatten the response object with direct properties\\n      const flatResponse = {\\n        responseId: response.responseId,\\n        createTime: response.createTime,\\n        lastSubmittedTime: response.lastSubmittedTime\\n      };\\n\\n      // Add answers with titles as keys\\n      for (const [questionId, answerData] of Object.entries(response.answers || {})) {\\n        // Get the user-friendly question title, defaulting to ID if not found.\\n        const questionTitle = questionIdToTitle[questionId] || questionId;\\n\\n        // Check if this questionId is the main ID of a known grid question\\n        const gridMetadata = gridQuestionsMetadata[questionId];\\n\\n        if (gridMetadata) {\\n          // THIS IS THE MAIN GRID QUESTION, PROCESS ITS NESTED ANSWERS\\n          const gridAnswer = {};\\n          if (answerData.answers && answerData.answers.length > 0) {\\n            if (gridMetadata.type === 'multiple choice grid') {\\n              answerData.answers.forEach(rowAnswer => {\\n                const rowValue = rowAnswer.rowQuestion?.value;\\n const columnText = gridMetadata.columns.find(c => c.value === columnValue)?.text || columnValue;\\n\\n                if (rowText && columnText) {\\n                    gridAnswer[rowText] = columnText;\\n                }\\n              });\\n            } else if (gridMetadata.type === 'checkbox grid') {\\n              answerData.answers.forEach(rowAnswer => {\\n                const === colVal)?.text || colVal\\n                );\\n                if (rowText) {\\n                    gridAnswer[rowText] = columnTexts;\\n                }\\n              });\\n            }\\n          }\\n          flatResponse[gridMetadata.title] = gridAnswer;\\n        }\\n        // Handle other question types (non-grid OR grid components that appear as top-level questions)\\n        else characters and any non-alphanumeric or underscore characters\\n  return key.replace(/\\\\n/g, '_').replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9_]/g, '_');\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Recursively sanitizes keys within an object. This is important for nested grid answers.\\n * @param {Object} obj - The object whose keys need sanitizing.\\n * @returns {Object} A new object with sanitized keys.\\n */\\nfunction sanitizeObjectKeys(obj) {\\n  const newObj = {};\\n  for (const key in obj) {\\n    if (obj.hasOwnProperty(key)) {\\n      const sanitizedKey = sanitizeKey(key);\\n      // If the value is an object and not null/array, sanitize its keys recursively\\n      if (typeof obj[key] === 'object' && obj[key] !== null && !Array.isArray(obj[key])) {\\n        newObj[sanitizedKey] = sanitizeObjectKeys(obj[key]);\\n      } else {\\n        newObj[sanitizedKey] = obj[key];\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return newObj;\\n}\\n\\n// Main function to fetch and merge metadata with responses\\nasync function getMergedFormResponses() {\\n  try {\\n    const { questionIdToTitle, createTime, lastSubmittedTime, gridQuestionsMetadata } = await getFormMetadata();\\n    const formattedResponses = await getFormResponses(questionIdToTitle, gridQuestionsMetadata);\\n\\n    // Sanitize keys for each response object in the array\\n    const sanitizedResults = formattedResponses.map(response => sanitizeObjectKeys(response));\\n\\n    // Ensure sanitizedResults is always an array, even if empty\\n    return sanitizedResults.length > 0 ?
